zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，延续上行尝试
zh.content:
价格运行在0.1521的20日均线上方，24小时小幅收涨，且日内高低点区间收窄，说明ADA短线以震荡偏强为主，多头仍在尝试抬升控制权。

MACD为0.0021，处于零轴上方，显示动能略占优势；但RSI和信号线缺失，意味着当前更适合观察价格是否能持续站稳均线而非追涨。

下方支撑先看0.1537日内低点，其次是0.1521均线附近；上方阻力在0.1557前高，若有效突破，0.1580一带可能成为下一目标。

操作上宜以回踩分批介入为主，止损可设在0.1537下方，突破0.1557后再顺势加仓；若放量站稳均线，短线结构仍偏向上行。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is attempting a modest recovery, with price trading at 0.1551 after a 0.95% daily gain. The pair is holding just above the 20-day simple moving average at 0.1521, which suggests the short-term structure is improving, though the move is not yet decisive. Intraday range remains tight between 0.1537 and 0.1557, pointing to controlled momentum rather than a breakout-driven trend. Overall, the market looks cautiously constructive.

The available indicators lean mildly bullish. The MACD reading at 0.00212 indicates positive momentum, but without the signal line it is harder to confirm a full crossover or gauge the strength of the trend. RSI is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed directly. Even so, price staying above the SMA(20) is a useful sign that buyers are defending the near-term trend and preventing a deeper pullback.

Immediate support appears near 0.1537, the session low, with stronger support around 0.1521, aligned with the 20-day SMA. If that level breaks, the market could revisit the 0.1500 area, where psychological support may emerge. On the upside, resistance sits near 0.1557, the intraday high, followed by the 0.1580 to 0.1600 zone if momentum expands. A clean move through resistance would improve the short-term technical outlook.

For traders, the current setup favors patience and disciplined entries. Short-term bulls may look for confirmation above 0.1557 before adding exposure, as that would signal acceptance above recent highs. More conservative participants may prefer pullbacks toward 0.1521 for better risk-reward placement, with stops just below support. Until RSI and the MACD signal line provide stronger confirmation, the best approach is to treat the move as a tentative recovery rather than a confirmed trend reversal.
